title: Philips India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Philips India Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
